message:
chore(beads): sync issue state after closure sweep

Flushes .beads/issues.jsonl deltas accumulated during this session's
closure sweep. Specifically captures the state transitions for the
beads closed in commits bf4a63b9 (ft-7axpo), 0239fbd6 (ft-6mxfs),
5c8c417c (ft-s9oci), 0e1432fc (ft-z01cl), and 892cfdd9 (ft-6269x),
plus the answered-and-closed disposition on ft-kcsae (follow-up
ft-wk5fo filed) and ft-h9g0q (sweep landed across 87d4546b +
0b65bc0b).

No new beads created, no in_progress transitions beyond the closures.
The 4 remaining non-epic in_progress beads (ft-1memj.28, ft-lnlg4,
ft-e34d9.10.5.2, ft-wk5fo) have no landed fix commits in the last
6 hours of git history and stay open.
